files.content:
<film>
  <scene>
    <shot id="story">
      <video src="media/a.mp4"/>
      <title>Story</title>
    </shot>
    <shot id="compile">
      <video src="media/b.mp4"/>
      <title>Compile</title>
    </shot>
    <shot id="render">
      <video src="media/c.mp4"/>
      <title>Render</title>
    </shot>
  </scene>
</film>

<film>
  <cues>
    <cue id="offer" time="2s"/>
  </cues>
  <scene>
    <shot>
      <video src="media/offer.mp4"/>
      <title>30% off</title>
      <cta cue="offer">Buy now</cta>
    </shot>
  </scene>
</film>
